title: Build the versioned local editable Demo Sandbox store
objective: Implement a defensive, versioned localStorage Demo Sandbox store with safe validation, persistence, reset, memory fallback, and immutable template protection.
acceptanceCriteria: Use travel-app-demo-sandbox-v1 and persist schemaVersion, templateVersion, sandboxId, trip, createdAt, and updatedAt.
Use local-demo-sandbox only as local identity and never as a Firebase room ID or myTrips identity.
Run localStorage write/read/remove availability preflight and return defensive copies from every read.
Validate parse, schema, template version, IDs, and trip content as untrusted input before use or write.
Rebuild a safe Sandbox from a fresh immutable template for missing, corrupted, expired, stale, or incompatible data without Firebase access.
Provide explicit write errors and a clearly reported memory-only fallback when storage is unavailable.
Reset only the local Sandbox key and rebuild from the current templateVersion.
Prove Sandbox edits and Reset cannot mutate createTokyoDemoTrip source objects.
Never write Firebase, Storage, myTrips, or Offline Trip Cache.
